requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Georgia 220 V/50 Hz Grid, Type C/F Plug (GS / IEC 62368-1 Alignment)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——格鲁吉亚220V/50Hz电网，C/F型插头（GS / IEC 62368-1接轨）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——喬治亞220V/50Hz電網，C/F型插頭（GS / IEC 62368-1接軌）

summary.en: Wireless and electronic devices placed on the Georgian market must comply with electrical safety requirements applicable to the Georgian 220 V/50 Hz power grid. Georgia uses Type C (Europlug, 2-pin, ungrounded) and Type F (Schuko, 2-pin with grounding clips) electrical sockets — a legacy of Soviet-era infrastructure supplemented by modern Schuko installations. Electrical safety standards for powered wireless devices are based on GEOSTM GS standards, which are progressively aligned with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements) and IEC 60950-1 under the EU Association Agreement. Devices must be designed and tested for 220 V/50 Hz operation. Power supplies, chargers, and mains-connected wireless devices must carry correct voltage/frequency markings. Conformity to GS electrical safety standards must be evidenced by test reports from accredited laboratories as part of the GNCC type approval and GEOSTM conformity documentation. Chinese 110V/60Hz or dual-voltage devices must be verified for 220V/50Hz safety. The use of CE-aligned test reports (EN/IEC 62368-1 from accredited laboratories) is generally accepted as technical evidence in Georgia under DCFTA alignment, but GNCC/GEOSTM documentation is separately required.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的无线电及电子设备，须符合适用于格鲁吉亚220V/50Hz供电网络的电气安全要求。格鲁吉亚使用C型（欧标双极无接地插头）和F型（Schuko，带接地夹双极插头）电源插座——这是苏联时期基础设施的遗存，辅以现代Schuko装置。有源无线设备的电气安全标准基于GEOSTM GS标准，依据欧盟联系协议正逐步与IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全要求）和IEC 60950-1接轨。设备须针对220V/50Hz运行进行设计和测试。电源适配器、充电器及主电源连接无线设备须具备正确的电压/频率标识。须通过认可实验室出具的测试报告，作为GNCC型号核准及GEOSTM合格文件的组成部分，证明符合GS电气安全标准。中国110V/60Hz或双电压设备须核实220V/50Hz安全性。依据DCFTA接轨，来自认可实验室的CE标准测试报告（EN/IEC 62368-1）通常在格鲁吉亚可作技术证据被接受，但须另行取得GNCC/GEOSTM文件。
summary.zht: 投放喬治亞市場的無線電及電子設備，須符合適用於喬治亞220V/50Hz供電網路的電氣安全要求。喬治亞使用C型（歐標雙極無接地插頭）和F型（Schuko，帶接地夾雙極插頭）電源插座——這是蘇聯時期基礎設施的遺存，輔以現代Schuko裝置。有源無線裝置的電氣安全標準基於GEOSTM GS標準，依據歐盟聯繫協議正逐步與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通信技術設備——安全要求）和IEC 60950-1接軌。設備須針對220V/50Hz運行進行設計和測試。電源適配器、充電器及主電源連接無線裝置須具備正確的電壓/頻率標識。須通過認可實驗室出具的測試報告，作為GNCC型號核准及GEOSTM合格文件的組成部分，證明符合GS電氣安全標準。中國110V/60Hz或雙電壓設備須核實220V/50Hz安全性。依據DCFTA接軌，來自認可實驗室的CE標準測試報告（EN/IEC 62368-1）通常在喬治亞可作技術證據被接受，但須另行取得GNCC/GEOSTM文件。

standards_or_laws: GEOSTM GS standards for electrical safety — aligned with IEC 62368-1 and IEC 60950-1 for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment
EU Association Agreement / DCFTA (in force 2016) — drives alignment with EU Low Voltage Directive (LVD) and EN/IEC 62368-1 electrical safety standards
Electronic Communications Law of Georgia (2005, as amended) — references technical standards for equipment safety on the Georgian market
Georgia grid standard: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug types C (Europlug) and F (Schuko)

summary.en: Chinese wireless and electronic devices must comply with electrical safety requirements under GB standards, primarily GB 4943.1 (Safety of information technology equipment — based on IEC 60950-1) and GB 17625 series (harmonics and flicker). China uses a 220 V/50 Hz grid with Type A, Type I, and Type C sockets (GB 2099 standard). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety for in-scope products. Chinese GB electrical safety test reports and CCC certificates are not recognised by GEOSTM or GNCC and do not substitute for GS-aligned electrical safety conformity in Georgia. Note: China also uses 220V/50Hz, so voltage compatibility is typically not an issue, but plug type and socket compatibility must be addressed for the Georgian Type C/F market.
summary.zh: 中国无线电及电子设备须符合GB标准规定的电气安全要求，主要为GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全——基于IEC 60950-1）和GB 17625系列（谐波及闪烁）。中国使用220V/50Hz电网，采用A型、I型及C型插座（GB 2099标准）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖适用范围内产品的电气安全。中国GB电气安全测试报告及CCC证书不被GEOSTM或GNCC承认，不可替代格鲁吉亚的GS接轨电气安全合规。注意：中国同样使用220V/50Hz，因此电压兼容性通常不成问题，但须针对格鲁吉亚C/F型市场处理插头和插座兼容性问题。
summary.zht: 中國無線電及電子設備須符合GB標準規定的電氣安全要求，主要為GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全——基於IEC 60950-1）和GB 17625系列（諧波及閃爍）。中國使用220V/50Hz電網，採用A型、I型及C型插座（GB 2099標準）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋適用範圍內產品的電氣安全。中國GB電氣安全測試報告及CCC證書不被GEOSTM或GNCC承認，不可替代喬治亞的GS接軌電氣安全合規。注意：中國同樣使用220V/50Hz，因此電壓相容性通常不成問題，但須針對喬治亞C/F型市場處理插頭和插座相容性問題。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — China national safety standard for information technology equipment (based on IEC 60950-1)
GB 17625 series — China national standard for harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuations
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, mandatory electrical safety certification for in-scope products sold in China
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug types A, I, C (GB 2099)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety test reports and certificates based on GB standards are not recognised by GEOSTM or GNCC. Separate electrical safety testing against GS/IEC 62368-1 (or EN/IEC 62368-1 under DCFTA alignment) by a GEOSTM-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory is required for GNCC type approval and Georgian market entry. Although China and Georgia both use 220 V/50 Hz, plug type differences must be addressed: Georgia uses Type C/F (Schuko-compatible) sockets. Products shipped to Georgia with Chinese plug types (Type A or Type I) are not suitable for direct use and must be adapted. EN/IEC 62368-1-based test reports from accredited EU or internationally recognised laboratories are generally accepted as technical evidence in Georgia under DCFTA alignment, but GNCC/GEOSTM conformity documentation remains separately required.
gap.zh: 基于GB标准的中国CCC电气安全测试报告及证书不被GEOSTM或GNCC承认。须由GEOSTM认可或国际认可实验室按GS/IEC 62368-1（或DCFTA接轨的EN/IEC 62368-1）进行单独电气安全测试，作为GNCC型号核准及格鲁吉亚市场准入的支持文件。虽然中国和格鲁吉亚均使用220V/50Hz，但须处理插头类型差异：格鲁吉亚使用C/F型（Schuko兼容）插座。以中国插头类型（A型或I型）发往格鲁吉亚的产品不能直接使用，须进行适配。依据DCFTA接轨，来自认可欧盟或国际认可实验室的EN/IEC 62368-1测试报告通常在格鲁吉亚可作技术证据被接受，但GNCC/GEOSTM合格文件仍须另行取得。
gap.zht: 基於GB標準的中國CCC電氣安全測試報告及證書不被GEOSTM或GNCC承認。須由GEOSTM認可或國際認可實驗室按GS/IEC 62368-1（或DCFTA接軌的EN/IEC 62368-1）進行單獨電氣安全測試，作為GNCC型號核准及喬治亞市場准入的支持文件。雖然中國和喬治亞均使用220V/50Hz，但須處理插頭類型差異：喬治亞使用C/F型（Schuko相容）插座。以中國插頭類型（A型或I型）發往喬治亞的產品不能直接使用，須進行適配。依據DCFTA接軌，來自認可歐盟或國際認可實驗室的EN/IEC 62368-1測試報告通常在喬治亞可作技術證據被接受，但GNCC/GEOSTM合格文件仍須另行取得。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity against GS/IEC 62368-1 standards required for powered wireless devices entering the Georgian market; Type C/F plug compatibility required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC electrical safety certification under GB 4943.1 required for in-scope powered wireless devices sold in China; Type A/I/C plug standard applies

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian Standards and Metrology Institute (საქართველოს სტანდარტებისა და მეტროლოგიის ეროვნული სააგენტო)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity against GS/IEC 62368-1 (EU-aligned under DCFTA) is mandatory for powered wireless devices entering Georgia. Chinese CCC/GB-based electrical safety certifications are not recognised. EN/IEC 62368-1 test reports from accredited laboratories are accepted as technical evidence, but GNCC/GEOSTM conformity documentation is still required. Plug type must be adapted to Georgia Type C/F (Schuko-compatible); voltage (220V/50Hz) is the same as China.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据GS/IEC 62368-1（依DCFTA与欧盟接轨）的电气安全合规对进入格鲁吉亚的有源无线设备为强制要求。中国基于CCC/GB的电气安全认证不被承认。来自认可实验室的EN/IEC 62368-1测试报告可作技术证据被接受，但GNCC/GEOSTM合格文件仍须另行取得。插头类型须适配格鲁吉亚C/F型（Schuko兼容）；电压（220V/50Hz）与中国相同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據GS/IEC 62368-1（依DCFTA與歐盟接軌）的電氣安全合規對進入喬治亞的有源無線裝置為強制要求。中國基於CCC/GB的電氣安全認證不被承認。來自認可實驗室的EN/IEC 62368-1測試報告可作技術證據被接受，但GNCC/GEOSTM合格文件仍須另行取得。插頭類型須適配喬治亞C/F型（Schuko相容）；電壓（220V/50Hz）與中國相同。
